onboardingFirstMessage:
There is no instant preview.
You won’t see the result until the entire roll is developed
onboardingSecondMessage:
Each roll is limited to 36 exposures.
Once finished, the film is sent to the lab for processing
onboardingSendStepMessage: Once sent to print, your roll will be locked and processed
onboardingCountdownMessage:
Calibrating digital negatives.
This will take a moment
onboardingGoToAlbumTitle: Your frame is ready for review
onboardingGoToAlbumMessage: Tap to open the digital archive and see your captured moments
onboardingAlbumMessage: Check out the first album you created!
onboardingCameraGoBackTitle: No preview, just live in the moment!
onboardingCameraExitTitle: Do you want to finish it?
onboardingCameraExitMessage: Do you want to skip the app introduction and discover it for yourself?
